title: juncus nodosus var. genuinus
intro: Juncus nodosus var. genuinus, also known as jointed rush or nodding rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Juncus nodosus var. genuinus include treating urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Juncus nodosus var. genuinus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to apply to affected areas.
